title: Streblacanthus cordatus
taxonomy: Streblacanthus cordatus is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It belongs to the genus Streblacanthus, which is a group of shrubs and small trees. The plant is native to tropical and subtropical regions, and its classification places it within the order Lamiales. The family Acanthaceae is a diverse group of flowering plants, commonly known as acanthus or acanthus family. Within the Acanthaceae family, Streblacanthus cordatus is further classified as a member of the subfamily Acanthoideae.
